title: EcoCraft [LITE]
description: [LITE VERSION] A modpack with dinosaurs, machines, trains and all kinds of sorts. Have a completely different origin, upgrade your path and level up before your enemies do. Features powerful bosses and weapons to fight them! Recommended with friends!
body:
![EcoCraft Long Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e36c445216615770b20c0bc1d97eef2a76c0ecd_0.webp)

## 🌿 EcoCraft LITE

**MineWorks: EcoCraft LITE** is a performance-friendly version of the original *EcoCraft* experience — designed for players with **low to mid-end PCs** who still want to enjoy everything this **RPG-meets-cooperative-survival** modpack has to offer.

It keeps all the core systems: **races, jobs, classes, seasons, party gameplay, automation, exploration, and building**, while removing heavier visual and audio mods for a **smoother experience**.

And best of all: it's **100% compatible with the full version** — so you can still play with your friends on the same world or server.

### **_Not recommended to use this version as a host, some world-generation and mechanics may break!_**

---

### 🧬 Play Your Role. Choose Your Race. Level Your Class.

Just like in the full version, players choose a **unique race (Origins)** and combine it with a **profession and RPG class** using **RPG Series**, **JobsAddon**, and **LevelZ**.

🎯 Whether you're a **Fairy Alchemist**, a **Fox Rogue**, or a **Druid Warrior**, the Lite version lets you experience all the class-based and race-based gameplay **without compromise**.

---

### 🌍 A World Worth Exploring — Light and Efficient

The Lite version keeps the stunning world generation from **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Better Nether**, **Better End**, and **YUNG’s structures**, ensuring every biome, cave, and ruin is still there, ready for exploration and settlement.

🌾 The **Serene Seasons** system is also present, preserving survival depth and biome interaction — crops, food, and weather still matter.

🏙️ You can still build immersive towns using core **decorative mods**, just with less rendering overhead.

🏺 **Archaeology**: Discover ancient ruins and unearth hidden treasures. Let your shovel guide you to forgotten history.

🧟 **New Creatures and Mobs**: From wild beasts to fantasy monsters - the world is more alive (and deadly) than ever.

🏯 **Dungeons and Ruins**: Explore new dangerous dungeons filled with traps, lore, and loot - now lighter but just as thrilling.

---

### 🔄 Smarter Early-Game, Deeper End-Game

* 🪓 **Early-Stage Mod**: Early game has been redesigned — you’ll start with simpler tools and work your way up through a more immersive, slower-paced tech tree.
* 🎣 **Fishing Mini-Game**: Fishing is now an interactive skill — and a fun way to relax while progressing.
* 💎 **TLOTD – Beyond Diamond**: In the late game, surpass traditional vanilla limits by crafting gear stronger than diamond and exploring a **new dimension** packed with resources and threats.

---

### ⚙️ Automation & Organization Included

🚂 Full support for **Create** and **Tom's Simple Storage** means you can still build amazing machines, factories, and storage systems.

🤝 The **party system** remains fully functional, with **shared XP, buffs, and collaboration tools**.

---

### 💻 Optimised for Lower-End PCs

The LITE version removes around 60 heavier mods, including:

* Physics-based sound and ambient audio systems
* Visual shaders, detailed animations, environmental effects
* Extra immersive UI and rendering-based enhancements

This improves performance **without affecting gameplay**.

---

### 💬 Still Multiplayer-Ready

* 🧩 Fully compatible with the **Essential Mod** for easy world hosting and co-op play
* 🎙️ **Voice Chat mod included**, so you can communicate in-game
* 🤝 Cross-compatible with the **full version** of EcoCraft — just make sure you're using the same world/mods on the server

---

### ⚠️ System Requirements & Tips

This is a **demanding** modpack. Make sure to:

* Use **at least 8GB RAM** (12GB recommended, 5GB minimum allocated to Minecraft) (-1GB if not hosting)
* Play with **8+ render distance** for optimal immersion
* Disable shaders manually if needed
* Lower-end PCs should avoid this pack, or expect real-world suffering

---

### 🔧 Ideal For:

* Players with **lower-spec PCs or laptops**
* Those wanting a **smoother FPS** while keeping the **core experience intact**
* Friends who want to play **cross-version** without losing compatibility

- 🔗 Fully compatible with the full *MineWorks: EcoCraft* modpack
- 🚀 Optimised for performance and stability
- 🎤 Voice chat and multiplayer included
- 🧩 Essential Mod ready
